JUDGE:ERIC G. HELGESEN/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:DIANA PADILLA C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. ORAL & DOC. EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH PARTIES. AT 3:31PM, CASE SETTLED BETWEEN PARTIES. TERMS ENTERED ON RECORD. PLFF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT. ALL EXHIBITS PRESENTED DURING THE TRIAL WITHDRAWN BY BOTH COUNSELS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERRIT, CAROLYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 130 EDDY STREET #308, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-08-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICTION UNTIL 5PM ON 4-8-97. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES. IF DFT VACATES TIMELY & COMPLIES WITH STIP, PLTF WILL DISM W/PREJ. IF NOT, PLTF ENTITLED TO AMENDED JUDGMNT TO INCLUDE BACK RENT & DMGS. MUTUAL RELEASE. SEE JUDGMNT FOR ADDITIONAL TERMS & CONDITIONS.
